Risk: Mail security policies applied tenant-wide too early
Treatment: Use pilot scope before broad enforcement
Validate with pilot users and document allow/review process

Risk: Safe Attachments delays or blocks legitimate attachments
Impact: Mail delivery delay or user disruption
Treatment: Use pilot scope and safe validation messages only
Review impersonation settings and quarantine results before expansion
Document admin review workflow before release decisions

Risk: Real phishing or malware used in testing
Treatment: Use safe test messages only and do not upload real malware

Risk: Private email content exposed in evidence
Treatment: Crop or blur message body content and sensitive headers

Risk: Public IP or location exposed in evidence
Treatment: Exclude IP/location fields and sanitize screenshots
Export accepted domains mailboxes and policy baseline before configuration
Create rollback and operational controls before final validation
